# Repo Agent Routing

Route repo work through the most specific agent available.

- Start with `repo-planner` for orchestration and decomposition.
- Use `python-educator` for curriculum or pedagogy-heavy content.
- Use `technical-content-evaluator` for correctness and quality gates.
- Use presentation agents for slide-deck work.
- When requirements shift, restate the operating contract before continuing.
